name: ORBITAL SCHWANNOMA

demographics.Location: branches of trigeminal (CN V) nerve (most common) > oculomotor > trochlear >

dominant_finding: T2-hyperintense heterogeneous pattern ← mixture of solid and cystic components
distribution: branches of trigeminal (CN V) nerve (most common) > oculomotor > trochlear >

dumbbell shape ← involvement of superior orbital fissure
